title: xerochrysum palustre
intro: Xerochrysum palustre, also known as the yellow button or marsh everlasting, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Xerochrysum palustre include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. It is often prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is commonly used in aromatherapy and herbal remedies for its soothing and calming effects.
